## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

> **Do not** paste your Personal Access Token or any secret in this issue.

## To reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Vault location: (internal storage / SD / cloud-backed folder)
2. Action: (initial sync / push / pull / conflict)
3. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual output / logs

```
paste any error message here (with tokens/secrets redacted)
```

- App version: (e.g. 0.1.0)
